content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Solve Debugging Bottlenecks Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how freelance pitching your debugging workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver faster, cleaner results.
content.answer_block: When your code fails to compile or debug, you lose billable hours and client trust. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for iterative CLI debugging, you shift from manual troubleshooting to automated resolution, reclaiming your time while maintaining the high-velocity output required for premium freelance projects.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the terminal bleeds red, and your deadline is a tightening noose. You’re a freelancer, not a martyr; every minute spent chasing a race condition is a minute you aren't shipping value. The difference between a struggling coder and a high-ticket consultant isn't the absence of bugs—it's the speed of the recovery.

We are moving beyond manual print-debugging. By leveraging AI-native toolchains like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can turn your terminal into an intelligent partner. This isn't just about fixing the current error; it's about pitching your workflow as a robust, automated engine that guarantees stability for your clients.

steps.title: Analyze the Failure State
steps.description: Before fixing, you must map the failure. Use Antigravity to perform a deep-dive structural analysis of your codebase to identify the root cause versus the symptoms.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory for architectural anti-patterns causing the reported runtime error. Identify the specific file and function responsible for the stack overflow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze the latest error logs in the terminal and map them to the corresponding code block.'

steps.title: Isolate the Logic Loop
steps.description: Isolate the buggy module into a sandbox environment. This prevents collateral damage to the rest of the production-ready code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal reproduction script for the identified bug. Extract the relevant dependencies and create a testable unit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a test file that isolates the failing function and reproduces the error reliably.'

steps.title: Automate the Fix Proposal
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate through potential patches, prioritizing performance and security over quick-and-dirty fixes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose three refactoring options for the buggy function, prioritizing memory safety and execution speed.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the most efficient fix from the proposed options and verify with a test suite.'

steps.title: Validate Integrity
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't introduce regressions. Automate the verification process to ensure the client's requirements are still met.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare the new implementation against the original requirements document to ensure zero regression in business logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run existing unit tests and verify the fix against the reproduction script.'

steps.title: Finalize and Document
steps.description: Clean up the code and add documentation. A well-documented fix is part of your professional pitch to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise technical memo explaining the bug, the fix, and the preventative measures taken.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate documentation for the changes and commit with a clear, descriptive message.'

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated branch for AI-assisted debugging to allow for instant rollbacks if the AI suggests a breaking change.
Inject your client's specific style guide into the Antigravity system prompt to ensure AI-generated code matches your existing architecture.
Use Claude Code's context-aware mode to automatically index your entire project before asking for complex refactors.
Treat the AI's output as a junior dev's draft; always perform a 'sanity check' on logic flow before merging to main.
Convert your resolved bug reports into a 'Value Delivered' PDF to show clients you proactively manage their technical debt.
content.next_steps: Now that you have automated your debugging workflow, begin integrating these tools into your CI/CD pipeline to ensure every commit is pre-validated by your AI agents.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your freelance schedule. Master the tools that allow you to ship with confidence and scale your dev capacity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
